pr.title: feat: Advanced AI Services — LLM Agent, Voice Cloning, Analytics, Training, Ring Analysis, Full-Duplex
pr.body: ## Summary Implements all 6 advanced AI services from Phase 10 implementation plan (items 10.12-10.17). Each service follows DDD with TDD, includes domain entities, provider interfaces, stub implementations, MySQL repos, HTTP handlers, and API routes. **14 files changed, +2892 lines, 18 new TDD tests (total: 217)** ### 1. Communication Agent (通信智能体) — LLM Agent autonomous call handling - `CommAgent` entity: mode (inbound/outbound), system prompt, max turns, skill group transfer - `CommAgentSession`: lifecycle (active → completed/transferred/failed), turn tracking, transcript - `CommAgentProvider` interface: `GenerateReply`, `ShouldTransfer` - Application orchestration: conversation turn processing with transfer decision - **5 TDD tests**: create, validation, session lifecycle, max turns exceeded, transfer ### 2. Voice Cloning (声纹复刻) — Custom TTS voice synthesis - `VoiceProfile` entity: status lifecycle (pending → training → ready/failed) - `VoiceCloningProvider` interface: `StartCloneTraining`, `CheckTrainingStatus`, `SynthesizeWithClone` - **3 TDD tests**: full lifecycle, name/URL validation ### 3. Conversation Analytics (智能对话分析) — Intent mining, SOP discovery - `ConversationAnalysisTask`: 4 analysis types (intent_mining, sop_discovery, sales_script, topic_cluster) - `ConversationAnalyticsProvider`: `MineIntents`, `DiscoverSOPs`, `ExtractSalesScripts`, `ClusterTopics` - **3 TDD tests**: task lifecycle (pending → running → completed), validation ### 4. Training System (智能培训) — Courses, exams, simulated calls - `TrainingCourse` (draft → published → archived), `TrainingExam` (auto pass/fail by course pass score) - `SimulatedCall` (AI feedback + scoring for practice calls) - `TrainingProvider`: `EvaluateSimulatedCall`, `GenerateExamQuestions` - **4 TDD tests**: course publish, exam pass/fail, simulated call, validation ### 5. Ring Analysis (彩铃识别) — Outbound call answer detection - `RingAnalysisConfig` (per-tenant: detection timeout, hangup on voicemail/fax) - `RingAnalysisLog` (human/voicemail/busy/no_answer/fax/unknown with confidence) - `RingAnalysisProvider`: `AnalyzeRingAudio` - **1 TDD test**: config upsert + log + query ### 6. Full-Duplex Interaction (全双工交互) — Smart interruption + voice continuity - `FullDuplexConfig` (interruption sensitivity 0-1, silence threshold, voice continuity toggle) - `FullDuplexProvider`: `DetectInterruption`, `ContinueVoice` - **2 TDD tests**: config upsert, invalid sensitivity validation ### Infrastructure - Migration `000003_advanced_ai`: 10 new MySQL tables - 10 MySQL repository implementations with compile-time interface checks - Stub providers for all 6 services (pluggable architecture) - 30+ new API endpoints wired into router under `/tenants/{tenantID}/` ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Review domain entity field completeness — verify `CommAgent.SystemPrompt` and `FullDuplexConfig.InterruptionSensitivity` ranges match your AI provider requirements - [ ] Verify migration `000003_advanced_ai.up.sql` table definitions match your MySQL version (uses `LONGTEXT`, `DOUBLE`) - [ ] Check stub providers return reasonable defaults — production deployment needs real LLM/ASR/TTS provider implementations - [ ] Run `go test -race ./internal/domain/ai/...` to verify all 50 AI domain tests pass ### Notes - All provider interfaces are pluggable — replace `Stub*Provider` with real implementations (Tongyi, OpenAI, etc.) in production - `CommAgentProvider.ShouldTransfer` enables autonomous transfer-to-human decisions based on conversation context - `RingAnalysisConfig` supports per-tenant customization of outbound detection behavior - `FullDuplexConfig.InterruptionSensitivity` is validated to [0, 1] range at domain level Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
